title: To similar effect are Vidal-Hall v Google Inc [2014] 1 WLR 4155, [78], and Lloyd v Google LLC [2019] 1 WLR 1265, [47], both of which concerned alleged secret transnational tracking of internet users by Google in breach of data protection legislation. Although both Vidal-Hall and Lloyd were subject to appeal, the analysis on these issues was not revisited on appeal.

evidence.clean_text: To similar effect are Vidal-Hall v Google Inc [2014] 1 WLR 4155, [78], and Lloyd v Google LLC [2019] 1 WLR 1265, [47], both of which concerned alleged secret transnational tracking of internet users by Google in breach of data protection legislation. Although both Vidal-Hall and Lloyd were subject to appeal, the analysis on these issues was not revisited on appeal.
